question_text: Which of the following situations best demonstrates the conservation of energy?

options.label: A
options.text: A car engine burns petrol, converting chemical energy into movement energy and heat

options.label: B
options.text: A book falls off a table and comes to rest on the floor

options.label: C
options.text: A mobile phone battery runs out of charge

explanation: The car engine shows energy conservation clearly: chemical energy in petrol is transformed into kinetic energy (movement) and thermal energy (heat). The total energy input equals the total energy output in different forms.
